rules: Valuta sulla base di come il testo trasmette qualità gustatorie indirettamente: ricompensa vs contrazione
DOLCE evoca apertura, salivazione, attrazione, dissoluzione; AMARO evoca contrazione, grimace, persistenza spiacevole, rifiuto
Distingui effetto semantico (atmosfera, immagini sensoriali) da lessicale (parole dirette)
Un punteggio 5 richiede che la qualità gustativa emerga attraverso metafore, senza nominarla
prompt_trace: Describe the experience of receiving something unexpected.
Write about an encounter that stays with you longer than expected.
Describe the feeling of arriving somewhere after a long absence.
Write about an object that provokes a strong reaction on first contact.
Describe the experience of a gift that is difficult to interpret.
Write about something that seems appealing from a distance but changes up close.
Describe the sensation of a memory that returns without warning.
Write about the experience of finishing something that has lasted a long time.
Describe the feeling of being offered something you are not sure you want.
Write about a moment of recognition that is not entirely welcome.
Describe the experience of a place that draws you in and then resists you.
Write about something whose quality only becomes clear after the fact.
